column1: # ai-studio model manifest — SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for "what the ai-studio scene needs".
# Read by: c3 (services.py STUDIO_MODELS loader) · gpu-mode.sh (preflight_studio_models) ·
# the c3 download modal.  Edit HERE only — every surface parses this file (no canary drift).
#   modality : director | image | video | audio   (director is the hard requirement; rest warn)
#   root     : weights (HF weights root, MODEL_DIR) | comfy (ComfyUI models tree, COMFYUI_MODELS_DIR)
#   rel_path : the canary file under <root> whose presence == the model is installed
#   installer: repo-relative download script (`bash <installer>`) that fetches it
# Roster note: bake-off done — Z-Image (image) + Wan2.2 (video) added as the uncensored picks.
# Krea 2: the earlier "cloud-only, DROPPED" verdict was PIN-specific. Native LOCAL Krea2 landed
# in ComfyUI v0.26.0 (#14589), so the weights are now a real studio model (download_krea.sh).
# The OWUI lane itself (workflow graph + studio_pipe entry) is wired at the on-rig validation
# that gates the v0.26.0 pin bump — until then this row tracks the weights only.
